song.title: Promises
song.author: Desperation Band
song.presentation: B V1 V2 P C1 C2 V1 V2 P C1 C2 B C1 C2
song.lyrics:
[B] All of Your promises won't let go of me
[V1] I've surrendered my life to Your ways I have learned what it means to obey Jesus, my heart has been changed by You
[V2] I am walking the path You have made I am seeking the truth everyday Jesus, my heart has been changed by You
[P] I couldn't walk away if I tried Cause Your love is better than life
[C1] The sun's shining bright and it just won't set Cause Your love is a light and it lights my step My heart is amazed every day to the next And Your joy overtakes and I can't forget about it
[C2] Woah I can't forget about it
